content.full_text:
March 24, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance Division
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Attn: Ms. Linda Cassidy

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation yesterday, this letter is to confirm your advice regarding Dick Morrow's request concerning the filing requirements to hold a legal defense fundraiser.

For your information, Mayor Morrow is not up for election this year and has closed his previous campaign bank account from his last campaign. He was reelected to office as Councilmember in November 1990.

You stated that Mr. Morrow must file a semi-annual form due on July 31, 1992, for the period January 1 through June 30, 1992. If he anticipates raising or spending $1,000, then he must file a Form 490, otherwise a short form 470 would be sufficient.

You stated that he must first open a bank account and file a Form 502 for the current term of office to pay for legal expenses incurred relating to his duties while in office. Also, form a committee and file a Form 410 with the Secretary of State within 10 days of forming the committee (or collecting/spending $1,000).

Please let me know if I have left anything out. Thank you, and I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,

Sharon Jones, CMC
City Clerk

cc: Mayor Morrow
File
